[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up of a small yellow rubber duck face fills most of the frame.

The main subject is a toy duck with a smooth, rounded yellow body. Its face shows two large, glossy, dark green eyes with white highlights, and a small orange beak. The duck’s body is cropped so that only the head and upper torso are visible, with the beak centered near the middle of the image.

The setting is a plain white background with no visible environment. The lighting is soft and even, creating gentle shading along the duck’s curved surface.

The image appears to be a tightly framed, front-facing view at a slight crop, emphasizing the duck’s eyes and beak. Colors are dominated by bright yellow and orange, with subtle shadowing under the chin and around the eyes.

No important visible text detected.

This image shows a close-up of a yellow duck toy against a plain white background. The duck’s prominent eyes and small beak are the main focus.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
